OSHINOGO_RELIC_PHOTO.title: Photo
OSHINOGO_RELIC_PHOTO.description: At the end of each battle, restore [green]3[/green] points of life to Ruby. For every 1 point of Shine/Revenge, an additional [green]1/3[/green] point of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_FAMILY_PHOTO.title: Family Photos
OSHINOGO_RELIC_FAMILY_PHOTO.description: At the end of each battle, restore [green]5[/green] health points to Ruby. For every 1 point of Shine/Revenge, an additional [green]3/4[/green] points of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_KANA_ARIMA.title: With The Guidance Of Maganai
OSHINOGO_RELIC_KANA_ARIMA.description: Gain 1 sparkle point at the beginning of each battle.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_KANA_ARIMA.flavor: It is said that he was once a talented child star who could cry in ten seconds.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_MEM.title: Operation Of MEM
OSHINOGO_RELIC_MEM.description: Gain an additional 20% when getting money.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_MEM.flavor: JK virtual idols are enthusiastic and energetic, but they hid a secret when they joined...
OSHINOGO_RELIC_NEW_B_KOMACHI.title: Freshman B Komachi
OSHINOGO_RELIC_NEW_B_KOMACHI.description: Add a secret code B to the deck.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_NEW_B_KOMACHI.flavor: The freshman B Komachi is composed of Ruby, Kana, and Mem.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH.title: Keep Watch
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH.description: Each time you receive damage, you will recover [green]2[/green] points of life.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH.flavor: Ruby's brother entered the entertainment industry for some unknown reason. Although he looks cold and venomous on the surface, he is actually a very gentle person.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH_EX.title: Overwatch EX
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH_EX.descript: Each time you receive damage, [green]4[/green] points of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BROTHER_WATCH_EX.flavor: Ruby's brother entered the entertainment industry for some unknown reason. Although he looks cold and venomous on the surface, he is actually a very gentle person.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_SARINA.title: Sarina's Passion
OSHINOGO_RELIC_SARINA.description: Get [green]3[/green] blood-soaked petals at the beginning of the battle.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_SARINA.flavor: Even in the ward, I always believed that the stage would Shine.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_AKANE.title: Lover's Support
OSHINOGO_RELIC_AKANE.description: The number of positive effects you have is doubled every four turns.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_AKANE.flavor: The cherished feelings will continue to echo in the battle.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BE_HATRED.title: Love's Hatred
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BE_HATRED.description: At the start of combat, apply 1 Trap to everyone.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BE_HATRED.flavor: Darkness born from lies; no matter how dazzling the shine, it will eventually be dragged into the abyss.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BE_HOPED.title: Love's Hope
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BE_HOPED.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Intangible.
OSHINOGO_RELIC_BE_HOPED.flavor: It carries love's most sincere and beautiful wishes, hoping Ruby and Aqua can grow up safely and live the life they truly want.
